name: Pumpkin Pie Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients until crumbly. Press into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat filling ingredients until smooth and pour over the crust.
4. Bake for 45 minutes.
5. Combine the brown sugar, pecans, and butter for the topping. Sprinkle over the top of the pie squares.
6. Bake an additional 15-20 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cool before storing in the refrigerator.
